results.name: table_t2_borderless
results.md_excerpt:
## T2 - Borderless table (no grid lines)

This table has no interior or exterior borders - only a single rule under the header.

| SKU    | Product       | Region   |   Qty |   Revenue |
|--------|---------------|----------|-------|-----------|
| A-1001 | Widget Alpha  | EMEA     |  1240 |  18600.00 |
| A-1002 | Widget Beta   | APAC     |   890 |  13350.50 |
| A-1003 | Gadget Gamma  | AMER     |  2310 |  46200.00 |
| A-1004 | Gadget Delta  | EMEA     |   540 |   8100.75 |
| A-1005 | Sprocket Eps  | APAC     |  1780 |  26700.00 |
| A-1006 | Sprocket Zeta | AMER     |   330 |   4950.25 |
| A-1007 | Cog Eta       | EMEA     |  1990 |  29850.00 |

results.notes: all values present but some out of original row (shift)
results.name: table_t3_colspan_header

'Q1 2026' spans the Units+Value columns; region label spans two header rows.

|--------|-----------|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| Region | Units     | Value     | Units     | Value     |
| EMEA   | 1240      | 18600     | 1310      | 19650     |
| APAC   | 890       | 13350     | 970       | 14550     |
| AMER   | 2310      | 46200     | 2510      | 50200     |
| LATAM  | 540       | 8100      | 600       | 9000      |

results.name: table_t6_financial_blankcol
results.md_excerpt:
## T6 - Financials, blank 'Adj.' column, right-aligned

The 'Adj.' column is entirely empty; numerics are right-aligned and parenthesised.

| Account          | 2024      | Adj.   | 2025      | Notes    |
|------------------|-----------|--------|-----------|----------|
| Revenue          | 1,204,000 |        | 1,388,500 | organic  |
| COGS             | (602,000) |        | (661,200) |          |
| Gross profit     | 602,000   |        | 727,300   |          |
| Opex             | (410,500) |        | (455,900) |          |
| Operating income | 191,500   |        | 271,400   | up 41.7% |
